Solution

## Unwavering Commitment For Arc Flash Mitigation

We, at Care Labs, strive to offer end-to-end support to all our clients in India. We are power system consultants with expertise in providing advanced arc flash study solutions for safety, reliability, efficiency, and compliance goals.

Support

## 360° Arc Flash Protection

We at Care Labs strive to offer end-to-end support to all our clients in India. We are power system consultants with expertise in providing advanced arc flash study solutions for safety, reliability, efficiency, and compliance goals.

Technical Support:

Our qualified team is equipped with the skills to use ETAP to generate arc flash labels and model and simulate the system under various conditions.

Safety And Compliance Support:

Arc Flash study reports from Care Labs ensure safety and compliance with standards like IEEE 1584, NFPA 70E, and Indian CEA regulations.

Technology

## Categorical Arc Flash Study In ETAP, Our Software Partner

Don’t take risks with arc flash hazards. We at Care Labs combine our expertise with ETAP technology to deliver steadfast results for Indian industries. Reach out to us to safeguard your power system.

System

## Equipment Requiring Arc Flash Protection

Our arc flash solutions are comprehensive, from data collection and incident energy calculation to arc flash boundary and arc flash PPE selection.

﻿Industries

## Indian Industries We Serve

Increasing energy demands and a shift towards sustainability have urged industries to conduct arc flash studies to protect their critical assets.
